Name: Average time for Request Payment in cases that previously experienced Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average time from Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER to Request Payment compared to the average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Request Payment in variants without any rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Total time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Request Payment grouped by whether the case had a prior Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Minimum time for Request Payment in successful variants (ending in Payment Handled) versus variants that included Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average time it takes Request Payment to be done after Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in the most frequent variant versus variants containing Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Request Payment in variants that include Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER, measured per re-submission cycle
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average waiting time to the Request Payment activity following a re-submission after Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Total resolution time of Request Payment in cases where the approval path included Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER versus cases that skipped the pre-approver role entirely
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Time between Request Payment and Payment Handled in variants that originated from a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER versus those that did not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time for Request Payment when the preceding activity is Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR, stratified by the number of prior rejection loops involving PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'
